name: Harden Inngest failure cleanup: tighten safe-non-core empty-catch guard + scope onFailure getStepDatabase writes
description: safe-non-core guard accepts a silent empty catch around billing/webhook inngest.send (re-opens the banned silent-recovery class); onFailure handlers in topic-probe-extract + auto-file-session call getStepDatabase() outside step.run, risking per-failure connection leaks + non-durable status writes; plus a GDPR erasure-completeness residual (terminally-failed erasure can leave Clerk identity un-deleted with no retry).
acceptanceCriteria:
1. safe-non-core empty-catch guard: empty catch {} no longer satisfies hasMeaningfulCatchHandling (RED pre-fix, GREEN post-fix).
2. auto-file-session.ts onFailure: wrapped in runWithStepDatabaseScope + closeStepDatabases.
3. topic-probe-extract.ts onFailure: same lifecycle applied.
4. Targeted test suites pass: safe-non-core.guard.test.ts, auto-file-session.test.ts, topic-probe-extract.test.ts.
5. CI required checks pass: main, API Quality Gate, Playwright web smoke, Merge completeness check.
6. Claude code review: APPROVED, 0 must-fix/should-fix.
